metaTitle: Sheng Ji Before Major Decisions: IPO, M&A and Deal-Making Fortune
metaDescription: Preparing for an IPO, acquisition, major bid or funding round? When skill and preparation are maxed out, Sheng Ji supplies the missing element: timing and earth-luck. Effects in about one year. WeChat NSDG521.

h1: Sheng Ji Before Major Decisions: When Human Effort Peaks, Borrow Heaven and Earth
heroSub: IPO eve, billion-dollar M&A, decisive bids, funding negotiations — you have done everything humanly possible; the last one percent belongs to timing and land

sections.h2: The moments when clients choose Sheng Ji

items.content: Years of preparation, yet the listing window is beyond anyone's control. This is the classic Sheng Ji moment: press reports have long linked tycoons like Li Ka-shing and Stanley Ho to Sheng Ji precisely because top entrepreneurs understand the weight of timing.

items.h3: M&A, bids and land approvals: insuring sunk costs
items.content: When tens of millions are already committed and everything hinges on a final decision, the cost of Sheng Ji functions like an insurance premium on timing and earth-luck for the entire project — a window that will not come twice.

items.h3: Funding negotiations: when it always slips at the last step
items.content: Many founders report the same pattern: preparation flawless, yet luck fails at the decisive moment. Sheng Ji channels dragon-vein qi to strengthen career and benefactor fortune, helping effort convert at the moments that matter.

sections.h2: Why the pre-decision period is the right timing

items.h3: You already have the human factor; Sheng Ji adds the other two
items.content: Of the classic triad — heaven's timing, earth's advantage, human harmony — accomplished people lack only the first two. Sheng Ji is precisely their combination: star-calendar timing plus true dragon-vein land.

items.h3: Effects in about one year — fast enough for your timeline
items.content: Ordinary feng shui takes five to ten years to register; Tzu Hsin Ge's date-selection method produces noticeable response in roughly a year. If your critical milestone falls within one to two years, the planting window is now.

The site shares its dragon vein with the ancestral tomb of Wang Yung-ching, Taiwan's 'god of management' — a textbook reverse-water formation that classical texts credit with rapid wealth and official prominence.

items.h3: Under time pressure: start with the 5-year version
items.content: Clients within a year of their milestone usually start with the RMB 72,000 trial version: no travel needed, items couriered, full video documentation, upgradeable later by paying the difference.

Entrepreneurs facing multiple milestones over the next decade often choose the RMB 500,000 lifetime version — exclusive burial spot, personal attendance, qi support across the whole career cycle. Contact Mr. Liang on WeChat NSDG521 for a one-on-one assessment.

acceptedAnswer.text: No honest practitioner guarantees outcomes. Sheng Ji strengthens fortune so that effort converts more readily and benefactors appear; your own preparation remains essential.
